face.structure: oval shape with high cheekbones and a distinct jawline

eyes.color: light grey with specks of blue
details: subtle gradient shading from iris to pupil
tiny golden flecks around the pupils
eyes.expression_effect: calculating and observant, as if constantly analyzing situations

face.expression: neutral with a slight furrow in the brow area, hinting at deep thought

skin.texture: smooth with light freckles across the nose bridge
skin.rendering_notes: use soft gradients to emphasize cheekbone structure

hair.color: charcoal black with subtle ash tones
hair.style: tousled, medium length layered cut tapering towards the neck
hair.flow: naturally wavy with a windswept look
details: a few strands occasionally falling over the forehead
slight shine giving a healthy appearance

character.aura: a calm, composed presence with a hint of tension

outfit.base: a fitted dark blue tactical jacket
details: silver zipper slightly open at the neck
outfit.fit: tailored, emphasizing lean frame without restricting movement

composition.framing: centred with a slight upper body focus to capture facial expressions
composition.pose: standing with arms crossed, weight slightly shifted to one leg
composition.gesture: subtle head tilt to the right, suggesting contemplation

background.color_palette: cool tones of grey and blue with hints of orange from setting sun
background.details: soft focus city lights forming bokeh in the background
background.rules: avoid sharp contrasts to keep focus on character
